mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (recipient_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, data, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{data}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
